tagline.zh: 印尼峇里島・數位遊牧旅居指南
tagline.en: A Digital Nomad's Field Guide to Bali

intro.zh: 集結峇里島數位遊牧最常用的辦公空間、住宿、社群與活動聚會。可依地區、類別、標籤篩選。
intro.en: Hand-picked coworking spaces, co-livings, communities and meetups for digital nomads in Bali. Filter by area, category and tags.
intro.id: Daftar pilihan coworking, co-living, komunitas, dan meetup untuk nomad digital di Bali. Filter berdasarkan area, kategori, dan tag.

blurb.zh: 峇里島數位遊牧 / 衝浪 / 夜生活 / 酒吧的大本營
blurb.en: HQ for digital nomads, surfing, nightlife and bars
blurb.id: Pusat nomad digital, surfing, nightlife & bar

blurb.zh: 類似更放鬆版的 Canggu，咖啡廳 / 夜生活 / 酒吧
blurb.en: A more relaxed version of Canggu — cafés, nightlife, bars
blurb.id: Versi lebih santai dari Canggu — kafe, nightlife, bar

blurb.zh: 旅修 / 瑜珈基地，充滿瀑布和叢林。也有不少數位遊牧在這生活
blurb.en: Yoga & retreat hub, waterfalls and jungle. Home to many long-stay nomads.
blurb.id: Pusat yoga & retreat, air terjun & hutan. Banyak nomad tinggal di sini.

blurb.zh: Canggu 北邊更悠閒的衝浪小區
blurb.en: Quieter surf neighbourhood north of Canggu
blurb.id: Area surfing yang lebih tenang di utara Canggu

description.zh: Canggu 老牌共同工作空間，遊牧客最常聚集的據點之一。
description.en: One of Canggu's classic coworking spaces — a long-time nomad hangout.
description.id: Coworking klasik di Canggu — tempat berkumpul nomad.

description.zh: 結合共居與共同工作的社群基地，常有 networking 活動。
description.en: Coworking + co-living combo with frequent community events.
description.id: Coworking + co-living dengan banyak acara komunitas.

description.zh: 小而美的共同工作空間，常辦女性社交與遊牧聚會。
description.en: Cozy coworking known for women-led socials and nomad meetups.
description.id: Coworking yang nyaman, sering ada meetup nomad & wanita.

description.zh: 東南亞知名遊牧連鎖品牌，Canggu 分點。會員制度。
description.en: Well-known SE-Asia nomad chain. Membership-based.
description.id: Jaringan nomad terkenal di Asia Tenggara. Berbasis keanggotaan.

description.zh: Canggu 中心點，網速快、餐飲齊全，新手第一站。
description.en: Central Canggu, solid wifi and food — a great first stop.
description.id: Pusat Canggu, wifi cepat & makanan lengkap.

description.zh: Seminyak 適合帶筆電的咖啡廳，環境舒適。
description.en: Laptop-friendly café in Seminyak with a comfortable vibe.
description.id: Kafe ramah laptop di Seminyak, suasana nyaman.

description.zh: 知名 brunch 咖啡廳，早上去工作很愜意。
description.en: Famous brunch café — pleasant to work from in the morning.
description.id: Kafe brunch terkenal, nyaman untuk kerja pagi.

description.zh: 氛圍極好的選物店咖啡，適合短時段工作。
description.en: Beautifully styled concept-store café for shorter work sessions.
description.id: Kafe concept store yang estetik, cocok untuk kerja singkat.

description.zh: Web3 / 加密圈遊牧聚集地，常見 token 支付與聚會。
description.en: Hub for Web3 / crypto nomads. Accepts token payments, hosts meetups.
description.id: Pusat nomad Web3 / kripto. Terima pembayaran token & meetup.

description.zh: 本地人氣咖啡品牌，網速穩定，價格友善。
description.en: Popular local coffee brand. Stable wifi, friendly prices.
description.id: Merek kopi lokal populer. Wifi stabil, harga ramah.

description.zh: Outpost 在 Ubud 的叢林版本，主打靜謐工作環境。
description.en: Outpost's jungle outpost in Ubud — quiet and focused.
description.id: Outpost versi hutan di Ubud — tenang & fokus.

description.zh: Outpost Ubud 第二個分點，旁邊就是稻田。
description.en: Outpost Ubud's second location — right next to rice fields.
description.id: Lokasi kedua Outpost Ubud — di samping sawah.

description.zh: 稻田景觀咖啡廳，氛圍極棒。
description.en: Café with rice-paddy view — gorgeous setting.
description.id: Kafe dengan pemandangan sawah — sangat indah.

description.zh: 小而溫馨的咖啡空間，網速 OK。
description.en: Small, cozy café with decent wifi.
description.id: Kafe kecil & nyaman dengan wifi yang lumayan.

description.zh: Ubud 高人氣 brunch 咖啡，輕食與工作都適合。
description.en: Popular Ubud brunch café — good for light meals and work.
description.id: Kafe brunch populer di Ubud — cocok untuk makan & kerja.

description.zh: 兩個鄰近的人氣咖啡空間，可換場景工作。
description.en: Two neighbouring popular spots — swap scenes while working.
description.id: Dua kafe populer yang berdekatan — bisa ganti suasana.

description.zh: 叢林氛圍咖啡，視覺超適合工作。
description.en: Jungle-aesthetic café with a stunning vibe.
description.id: Kafe bernuansa hutan, suasana memukau.

description.zh: Canggu 知名共居社群，月租含活動。
description.en: Well-known co-living in Canggu — monthly rates include events.
description.id: Co-living terkenal di Canggu — sewa bulanan + acara.

description.zh: Canggu 社交型共居，新朋友超多。
description.en: Social co-living in Canggu — meet lots of new people.
description.id: Co-living sosial di Canggu — banyak teman baru.

description.zh: Canggu 平價青旅，背包客與短居遊牧首選。
description.en: Budget hostel in Canggu — favourite of backpackers and short-stay nomads.
description.id: Hostel hemat di Canggu — favorit backpacker & nomad singkat.

description.zh: 派對氛圍青旅，年輕遊牧愛去。
description.en: Party-vibe hostel — popular with younger nomads.
description.id: Hostel bernuansa party — favorit nomad muda.

description.zh: Awan 的住宿端，結合社群與身心活動。
description.en: Awan's co-living side — combines community with wellness activities.
description.id: Sisi co-living Awan — komunitas & kegiatan wellness.

description.zh: Outpost Canggu 的住宿端，會員享受連動空間。
description.en: Outpost Canggu's living side — members access all spaces.
description.id: Sisi tempat tinggal Outpost Canggu — akses semua ruang.

description.zh: Seminyak 平價青旅，地點方便。
description.en: Budget hostel in Seminyak — convenient location.
description.id: Hostel hemat di Seminyak — lokasi strategis.

description.zh: Seminyak 共居空間，價格中等，房型多。
description.en: Seminyak co-living with moderate pricing and varied rooms.
description.id: Co-living di Seminyak dengan harga sedang & kamar beragam.

description.zh: Ubud 高 CP 值青旅，整潔現代。
description.en: Great-value Ubud hostel — clean and modern.
description.id: Hostel Ubud dengan nilai bagus — bersih & modern.

description.zh: Ubud 熱帶風共居，性價比佳。
description.en: Tropical-style co-living in Ubud with great value.
description.id: Co-living tropis di Ubud, harga bersaing.

description.zh: Ubud 經典背包客棧，認識新朋友首選。
description.en: Classic Ubud backpacker house — easy to meet new people.
description.id: Backpacker klasik di Ubud — mudah berkenalan.

description.zh: Outpost Ubud 住宿端，網速與環境都穩定。
description.en: Outpost Ubud's living side — stable wifi and environment.
description.id: Sisi tempat tinggal Outpost Ubud — wifi & lingkungan stabil.

description.zh: 峇里島數位遊牧最大的 Facebook 社團之一。
description.en: One of the largest digital-nomad Facebook groups for Bali.
description.id: Salah satu grup Facebook nomad digital Bali terbesar.

description.zh: Bali Nomads 主群（Telegram / WhatsApp）。
description.en: Main Bali Nomads group on Telegram / WhatsApp.
description.id: Grup utama Bali Nomads di Telegram / WhatsApp.

description.zh: Ubud 在地遊牧子群組。
description.en: Ubud-specific sub-group for nomads.
description.id: Sub-grup khusus Ubud untuk nomad.

description.zh: 創業者 / 老闆 / 自由業遊牧的群組。
description.en: For founders, freelancers and entrepreneurs.
description.id: Untuk founder, freelancer & entrepreneur.

description.zh: 找共同工作夥伴的群。
description.en: Group to find coworking buddies.
description.id: Grup untuk mencari teman coworking.

description.zh: 派對 / 夜生活活動資訊群。
description.en: Group for party and nightlife info.
description.id: Grup info pesta & nightlife.

description.zh: 內容創作者交流圈。
description.en: Circle for content creators.
description.id: Lingkaran untuk content creator.

description.zh: 遊牧固定羽球聚會，新手歡迎。
description.en: Recurring badminton meetup — beginners welcome.
description.id: Meetup badminton rutin — pemula dipersilakan.

description.zh: Padel 場地預約資訊，找球友一起玩。
description.en: Padel court booking info — find playing partners.
description.id: Info booking lapangan padel — cari teman main.

name.zh: BukitHub Coworking 一日免費體驗

description.zh: BukitHub 提供一日免費體驗，可先試再決定。
description.en: Free day trial at BukitHub — try before you commit.
description.id: Trial gratis sehari di BukitHub — coba sebelum komit.

description.zh: 每週二 Ubud 遊牧共同工作日（Host：Lestari）。
description.en: Weekly Tuesday coworking in Ubud (Host: Lestari).
description.id: Coworking mingguan Selasa di Ubud (Host: Lestari).

description.zh: 每月一次的 Web3 / 創業者聚會（Host：Jihad）。
description.en: Monthly Web3 / entrepreneur meetup (Host: Jihad).
description.id: Meetup bulanan Web3 / entrepreneur (Host: Jihad).

description.zh: Canggu 在地遊牧定期聚會（Host：Peter, Ella）。
description.en: Recurring Canggu nomad meetup (Host: Peter, Ella).
description.id: Meetup nomad rutin di Canggu (Host: Peter, Ella).
